segment.source: A radar (spider) chart that plots several scored dimensions on the spokes of one filled shape, with an accessible legend and screen-reader data table alongside. Use it to compare strengths across criteria such as skills, product attributes or maturity areas at a glance. Key fields are the heading and rich-text description, the Dimension | Score axes list (0–5 scale), an optional series name, the chart-data JSON the plot is drawn from, and a fill-opacity choice.
One axis per line as "Dimension | Score", e.g. Performance | 4.2. Scores use a 0–5 scale and drive the screen-reader data table. Keep the same labels and values in the chart data JSON below.
What the shape measures, e.g. "Desiderio, Q1 2026 review". Shown as the data-table score column header and announced to screen readers.
JSON the shape is drawn from: {"labels":["Performance"],"values":[4.2]} on a 0–5 scale. Match the labels and values entered under Dimensions.
{0}: radar chart comparing {1, plural, one {# dimension} other {# dimensions}} on a 0–5 scale{2}. The full breakdown follows in the data table.
